title: Research Input
description: Input specification for a research run. Must contain at least one claim, query, or axiom.

claims.description: Assertions to be tested against evidence.

queries.description: Questions to be answered with evidence.

axioms.description: Facts declared by the researcher to be assumed true. Not tested.

text.description: The factual assertion to be tested.

id.description: Claim identifier (e.g., C001). Auto-generated if omitted.

candidate_evidence.description: Researcher-provided URLs that may be relevant to this claim. Scored on equal terms with search-discovered sources.

text.description: The research question to be answered.

id.description: Query identifier (e.g., Q001). Auto-generated if omitted.

text.description: A fact to be assumed true for the duration of the research.

url.description: URL of the candidate evidence source.

description.description: Brief description of what this source contains and why the researcher believes it is relevant.

config.description: Research run configuration. All fields optional with sensible defaults.

mode.description: Execution mode. 'research' = standard run. 'fact-check' = extract claims from document first. 'rerun' = re-execute from existing research-input.md.

source_document.description: Path or URL to document for fact-check mode. Required when mode is 'fact-check'.

rerun_path.description: Path to existing research instance for rerun mode. Required when mode is 'rerun'.

model_overrides.description: Override default model tier for specific sub-agents.

researcher_profile.description: Researcher bias and expertise disclosure for calibration.

expertise.description: Domains of expertise that may bias the researcher's framing.

known_biases.description: Self-declared biases or conflicts of interest.

profile_path.description: Path to an external researcher profile file.
